title: Know the Difference Between a Hobby and a Business
summary: Sometimes knowing the distinction between a hobby and business isn’t always clear cut. The IRS has provided resources to assist in understanding the difference. The IRS provides the following information to help a taxpayer determine if their hobby qualifies as a business: Business Activities Five Th...

title: A Message from the President & CEO
summary: Fall 2022 Dear Shareholders, I hope everyone had a productive summer and fall fishing, hunting, and harvesting berries and greens in preparation for winter. As we continue to respond to the wreckage left by Typhoon Merbok and prepare for the winter ahead, we are immensely thankful that no lives were lost. While the storm was devastating, we will recover.
